## Checklist

- [ ] CI (Lint) is green
- [ ] Tested on a real pfSense box (version: ___) — required for changes to
      `install.sh`, `uninstall.sh`, `start.sh` or Unbound handling
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] No new dependencies (stock pfSense PHP + POSIX sh only)
